title: cyperus rigidellus
intro: Cyperus rigidellus, also known as the rigid flatsedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the sedge family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions. Its health benefits include acting as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent, making it useful in treating a range of conditions from wounds to diarrhea. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture for its medicinal uses.
